{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Ruler of the White Fox
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Ruler of the White Fox]] possesses power that can be emulated by using a boundary formation.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
